must_detect.matched_text:
Lakeside Pacific Holdings, Inc. — Cyber Incident Report for SEC Rule 17-C and NPC compliance
Company details: SEC Reg. No. CS2021-0098765; primary listing on the PSE Main Board; disclosures via EDGE
Incident date/time: 28 May 2026 10:14–10:25 PHT; current report posted on 30 May 2026 (public)
Summary: phishing led to brief access to a role mailbox (it.support@lakesidepacific.ph); no core systems or trading platforms were affected
Impacted content: vendor and HR intake forms with labels (“Name: ____”, “Address: ____”), placeholder TIN 000-000-000-000, and empty BIR Form fields
One file contained a valid-looking individual TIN 123-456-789-000 associated with an “Affected Employee – Payroll Specialist”; the entry was immediately redacted and the individual notified
No bank account numbers, credit cards, or customer balances were found; any strings like “Acct No.: 0000-0000-0000” were test data without valid checksums
Affected mailbox hosted at EastCloud-Quezon Node; access duration 11 minutes; logs show previews only and no attachments exfiltrated
Actions taken: password resets, MFA enforced, mailbox quarantine, and review of BSP-aligned cyber controls; no service outage occurred
Regulator references: NPC breach notice NPC-BN-2026-09-XY acknowledged; SEC filing ref 17-C-LPH-2026-006; PSE EDGE entry available
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
